g.text: Single-tenant, Railway-hosted FastAPI wrapping Cognee (graph + vector memory). Per-seat isolation, an agent-facing MCP, and self-evolving sync jobs — all in one process on one event loop.
3 · FastAPI APP · single process · single event loop (Cognee loop-bound)
⚠ SINGLE EVENT LOOP — Cognee binds its async DB engine to the first event loop that touches it.
All cognee work (add / cognify / query) must run on the web’s long-lived loop (scripts/stage_loop.py = one shared asyncio.Runner). A fresh asyncio.run() raises “Future attached to a different loop”.
seats · hashed tokens · audit events · capture policy
Mesh · Vault Activity (SSE stream) + Knowledge Mesh relationship map (ADR-0009)
shared org knowledge — READ-ONLY from MCP
Concurrency: in-process writer_lock + on-disk Kuzu lock → evolve splits into 2 phases
HOW IT WORKS — trace the five flows (badge colours match the numbers on the arrows above)
